title: Fabricly Light
description: A light mod pack while still containing a level of content mods.
body:
This pack adds various features for you and your friends to enjoy, such as new building blocks, and mods such as Terralith for exploration. Listen to your favorite songs with IMP. Includes Sodium to increase your game performance, and to allow lower-end devices to be still able to play.

NOTE:
This mod pack will sometimes get updated often or get left without getting updated.
Every time the modpack version gets reset to 1.0.0, it is recommended to create a new instance as many core mods gets removed or changed that could result in lost progress/data.
